name: dotfiles-lsp
description: Local Claude Code LSP plugins for languages that lack an official marketplace plugin

plugins.name: bash-lsp
plugins.description: Bash language server for shell scripts

plugins.name: yaml-lsp
plugins.description: YAML language server (CI configs, k8s manifests, compose files)

plugins.name: neocmake-lsp
plugins.description: neocmakelsp language server for CMake scripts
